LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CROATIAN SCHOLARSHIP FUND,A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFFS MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DEFENDANT'S "MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION" IS DENIED. A RECONSIDERATION MOTION MUST BE "BASED UPON NEW OR DIFFERENT FACTS, CIRCUMSTANCES, OR LAW" AND A VALID REASON FOR NOT PRESENTING THEM EARLIER. (CCP SEC. 1008; GILBERD V. AC TRANSIT (1995) 32 CAL.APP.4TH 1494, 1500.) THE MOVING PARTY SHALL STATE BY AFFIDAVIT "WHAT NEW OR DIFFERENT FACTS, CIRCUMSTANCES, OR LAW ARE CLAIMED TO BE SHOWN." (CCP SEC. 1008.) DEFENDANTS' "NEW FACTS AND CIRCUMSTANCES" ARE FROM DOCUMENTS THAT WERE AVAILABLE LONG BEFORE THE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION HEARING AND NO VALID REASON IS GIVEN FOR NOT PRESENTING THEM EARLIER. (SEE TICE DEC. 2:27-4:9.) THE SAME IS TRUE OF DEFENDANTS' "NEW LAW." (ID. AT 4:10-13.) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF THOMAS HUSTER'S MOTION TO BIFURCATE EQUITABLE ISSUES AT TRIAL. OFF CALENDAR. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CROATIAN SCHOLARSHIP FUND,A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Adjudication.

Defendant's "motion for reconsideration of order granting plaintiff's motion for summary adjudication" is denied.

A reconsideration motion must be "based upon new or different facts, circumstances, or law" and a valid reason for not presenting them earlier. (CCP Sec. 1008; Gilberd v. AC Transit (1995) 32 Cal.App.4th 1494, 1500.) The moving party shall state by affidavit "what new or different facts, circumstances, or law are claimed to be shown." (CCP Sec. 1008.)

Defendants' "new facts and circumstances" are from documents that were available long before the summary adjudication hearing and no valid reason is given for not presenting them earlier. (See Tice Dec. 2:27-4:9.) The same is true of defendants' "new law." (Id. at 4:10-13.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

Croatian Scholarship Fund, Inc.S Renewed Motion To Stay Action
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CROATIAN SCHOLARSHIP FUND's Renewed Motion To Stay Action.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The trial date in this case is December 5, 2022. Defendant seeks "an order to stay this action for 60-90 days" - i.e., a motion to continue the trial date. As the presiding judge's Department 206 has the exclusive power in our court to continue trial dates, defendant's motion is ordered off calendar in Department 302 and may be re-filed in Department 206.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action On Grounds Of Judicial Efficency And Inconvenient Forum Under C.C.P. 418.10(A)
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CROATIAN SCHOLARSHIP FUND'S Motion To Stay Action On Grounds Of Judicial Efficency And Inconvenient Forum Under C.C.P. 418.10(A).

Defendant's motion to stay this case in favor of a probate petition it recently filed in Contra Costa County Superior Court (No. P22-00903) is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff says defendant lacked standing to file the petition. Defendant says a September 27, 2022 hearing on the petition "hopefully will provide guidance." Defendant may be positioned to file a new stay motion after our sister court acts, vel non. Meanwhile, the trial date in our case remains December 5, 2022.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
